Received a call from Jingbo regarding network (NOR) down issue. Verified remotely that all computers were down.

  • Requested the user to send pictures of the firewall setup.

TimeEntry.Title: Switches, router, firewall-Nor Down
TimeEntry.Notes: While diagnosing, found that the internet was working, but the ZyXEL firewall behind the router was up and not accessible. Temporarily connected another router, enabled its DHCP, and replaced the firewall with it. The site came back online.<br data-start="385" data-end="388" />Later, the client reported that their KEYGUARD server was not working. Found that it was assigned a fixed IP address (192.168.1.21), which I had manually configured. After verification, everything is now functioning properly.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Key-Card Application error
TimeEntry.Notes: Received a call from Adam at client NOR regarding an issue with their key-card application, which was generating an error and not functioning. I connected to the server and the affected machine, verified that the computer was properly registered, and reviewed all documentation and troubleshooting steps. Despite confirming that the system was connected to the network and checking all relevant configurations, the issue remained unresolved. One of the systems is still able to generate keys, but the affected unit continues to fail. I attempted to contact the vendor’s support team; however, support is only available Monday through Friday. I notified Adam of this, and he confirmed that he will reach out to support on Monday since they have a second system working as a backup. With his confirmation, this ticket can be closed.

TimeEntry.Title: Distribution server NOR-HQ-VBR-01. not sync on manage engine
TimeEntry.Notes: While monitoring the NOR  site in the ManageEngine portal, it was observed that the distribution server NOR-HQ-VBR-01 was experiencing sync issues. The server repeatedly attempted to sync without any progress. Troubleshooting Steps Taken: Connected to the NOR-HQ-VBR-01 server and attempted to resolve the issue by restarting the ManageEngine Distribution Server (DS) service. However, the restart did not resolve the problem. Removed NOR-HQ-VBR-0 as an AD connector and deleted it as a Distribution Server from the ManageEngine portal. Downloaded a fresh DS package with the same configuration for NOR-HQ-VBR-01.Uninstalled the existing DS software from NOR-HQ-VBR-01 and installed the newly downloaded package. After completing the installation, the syncing issue was resolved. Verified the successful synchronization from the ManageEngine portal, and everything is now functioning as expected.

TimeEntry.Title: Updated missing patches on the WKNOR-FDLEFT
TimeEntry.Notes:
As per patch management, checked the pending patches for the below computer and found multiple updates required. Updated the patches one by one and performed a manual scan in the ManageEngine portal.
The system is pending for reboot to deploy the patches because the user was actively using the system.

WKNOR-FDLEFT:

TimeEntry.Title: Site Down - NOR
TimeEntry.Notes:
While checking machines on my remote for NOR, found all machines offline in our monitoring portals. After checking with the service provider, it has been confirmed that there is an internet outage on their end. They are working to resolve the issue, but it is taking some time due to bad weather conditions. So sent the email to Adam to update regarding this.

Contacted ISP again, they confirmed internet is restored now. Updated the same to Adam.

TimeEntry.Title: Distribution server NOR-HQ-VBR-01. not sync on manage engine
TimeEntry.Notes: While monitoring the NOR site in the ManageEngine portal, it was observed that the distribution server NOR-HQ-VBR-01 was experiencing sync issues. The server repeatedly attempted to sync without any progress. Troubleshooting Steps Taken: Connected to the NOR-HQ-VBR-01 server and attempted to resolve the issue by restarting the ManageEngine Distribution Server (DS) service. However, the restart did not resolve the problem. Removed NOR-HQ-VBR-0 as an AD connector and deleted it as a Distribution Server from the ManageEngine portal. Downloaded a fresh DS package with the same configuration for NOR-HQ-VBR-01.Uninstalled the existing DS software from NOR-HQ-VBR-01 and installed the newly downloaded package. After completing the installation, the syncing issue was resolved. Verified the successful synchronization from the ManageEngine portal, and everything is now functioning as expected.

running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine  .
Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 25.8.3.9466. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest
version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

After that rescan the backup repository , now the space has increased to 590 GB and is sufficient to run successful backup on next schedule.

TimeEntry.Title: NOR Veeam backups didn't run on scheduled time
TimeEntry.Notes:
Ticket Summary: NOR-HQ-VBR-01 – Agent and Access Recovery

Worked on NOR-HQ-VBR-01 to resolve multiple access and agent-related issues. Repaired the MyRMM agent and distribution server, followed by troubleshooting and resolving a login issue. Subsequently addressed a Veeam login issue.

During troubleshooting, the server became unresponsive after a reboot. As part of recovery, reinstalled the ScreenConnect agent, ManageEngine agent, and distribution server. After reinstallation, full access to the server was restored and all required services were confirmed operational.

Status: Resolved

TimeEntry.Title: NOR Veeam backups didn't run on scheduled time
TimeEntry.Notes: With the help of Lead, downloaded the new license file and updated the license on NOR-HQ-VBR-01 server and set the license to auto renewal which was set to other VBR servers as well. After the license updation , fixed the backup issue. Now the backups are passed.

TimeEntry.Title: Veeam Backup not working for NOR.

TimeEntry.Title: WKNOR-BACKOFFIC : Myremote sync issue found over this pc
TimeEntry.Notes: This PC was found offline for a long time, even though it appeared online regularly in MyRMM. I accessed and troubleshot the system and found that the session was blocked by Cisco Umbrella. I then checked the DNS policy for the NOR client and updated it to allow myremote2.technijian.com as well as technijian.com. After waiting about 30 seconds, the system was able to connect to MyRemote properly.
